source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A belt is drawn tightly around three circles of radius $10$ cm each, as shown. The length of the belt, in cm, can be written in the form $a + b\pi$ for rational numbers $a$ and $b$. What is the value of $a + b$? <image1>
